name: robot-automation
description: Athena CLI runs this authored Robot Framework (Browser library) E2E workflow across sessions - analyze setup, explore the live product, plan coverage, generate and review specs, write and review .robot tests, then execute and stabilize them
examplePrompts: Add Robot Framework tests for the login and signup flows at https://myapp.com
Build Robot Framework (Browser library) coverage for the checkout process
Write .robot E2E tests for the dashboard and settings pages
